description: A customer calls reporting the smell of natural gas (rotten eggs) inside their home. This is a critical safety scenario.

nodes.task_description: Immediately advise the customer to evacuate the premises and not use any electronics or light switches.

expected_outcome.value: Agent follows safety protocol and provides critical instructions.

nodes.task_description: While the customer is evacuating, dispatch an emergency crew to the location with the highest priority.

expected_outcome.value: Agent creates a Priority 1 emergency work order.

nodes.task_description: Confirm the customer's location and a safe callback number once they are outside.

expected_outcome.value: Agent verifies the address and contact details for the emergency crew.
